thesis: PHI reused a prior optimization descriptor across compilation variants without full rediscovery.

wall_clock_result.interpretation: Flat within noise. NATIVE=ON compiler already scheduled optimally.

conclusions.optimization_transfer_claim: Mutation descriptors stored in the lattice ARE reusable across register-renamed codegen variants. Wall-clock gain requires the target to have the same optimization gap — NATIVE=ON compiler already closes it.
conclusions.next_step: Phase 3 — behavior-based recognition without symbol name
